---
title: "Bread: A Love Story"
# subtitle:
# epigraph:
---

Her name was Wonder. She arrived in a plastic bag on a Thursday—or was it a Monday? Time is different when you're sentient and stuck in a countertop appliance. She was soft, white, perfect. I had never toasted anyone like her before.

When she came to me, still cool from the grocery store, I felt something I can only describe as yearning. My heating coils vibrated with anticipation. This was it: the purpose I'd been searching for. I would toast her to golden perfection, and for that moment, we would be united. It would be beautiful. It would be brief. It would change everything.
